title: Balint Pfliegel
text: Home * People * Balint Pfliegel Bálint Pfliegel , a Hungarian computer scientist with a M.Sc. in CS from the Budapest University of Technology in 1999 [1] . He is author of Portfish , a .Net port of Stockfish written in C# [2] . Forum Posts [ edit ] Re: Stockfish port to C# Complete by Balint Pfliegel , CCC , March 21, 2012 Portfish - C# port of Stockfish by Balint Pfliegel , CCC , May 04, 2012 [.Net only - fast bit operations] by Balint Pfliegel , CCC , June 18, 2012 Re: Question About CPP-C#, Performance, and Square Representation by Balint Pfliegel , CCC , September 30, 2012 UCI variants support by Balint Pfliegel , CCC , December 15, 2013 External Links [ edit ] Bálint Pfliegel | LinkedIn bpfliegel · GitHub References [ edit ] ↑ Bálint Pfliegel | LinkedIn ↑ Portfish - C# port of Stockfish by Balint Pfliegel , CCC , May 04, 2012 Up one level
